reference: W.-S. Ko, D.-H. Kim, Y.-J. Kwon, M. Lee (2018), Metals 8(11), 900. DOI: 10.3390/met8110900
method: LAMMPS examples/ELASTIC template, finite strain (up=1e-4) with cell+atom relaxation
computed_by: lmp_kokkos (LAMMPS 22 Jul 2025 Update 4) on NISSVR-LIVERPOOL, CUDA 12.6.3 + oneAPI 2025.1

comparison_with_NIST_IPR.verdict: all 6 independent Cij match NIST IPR within 1e-3 GPa; bulk geometry matches within 1e-5 Ang and 1e-5 eV/atom
